narrative:
Carey Ex Vill Sd (Wyandot) exempted village school district has 3,380 registered voters, with 57.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.6 percentage points.
